titleStmt.title: SII 39.226: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 226. (A.R. No. 226 of 1916.) SEṄGANMĀL, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. SEṄGANMĀLĪŚVARA TEMPLE-ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME MAṆḌAPA KAMPAṆṆA UḌAIYĀR, SON OF VĪRA BOKKAṆA UḌAIYĀR, SOBHAKRIT (1363 A.D.)

summary.p: This inscription refers to a grant of 10 vēli of land as sarvamāṇya by the king for worshipping and repairs works in the temple of Śeṅgaṇmalīchchuramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār at Taiyūr alias Rājakēśarinallūr in Kumiḻi nāḍu a sub-division of Āmūr kōṭṭam in Jayaṅgoṇḍachōḻa maṇḍalam. The order regarding the grant was issued by Sōmaya-Daṇṇanāyaka in accordance with the written order of Rājanārāyaṇaṉ-Sambuvarāyar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī Arirāyavipāṭaṉ pāṣaikkut tappuva I
rāyarkaṇṭaṉ pūrvadakṣiṇa pa
ccima samudrātipatin śrī virapokkaṇa Uṭaiyar
kumārar kampaṇṇa Uṭaiyāṟku cellāniṉṟa śobha
krat varuṣattu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu saptami
yum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cotināḷ jayaṅkoṇṭa
coḻamaṇṭalattu Āmūr koṭṭattu kumiḻi nāṭṭu taiy
yūrāṉa Irācakecari nallūr Uṭaiyar ceṅkaṇ māliccuram
muṭaiya nāyaṉāṟku Ivvūr ttal koyiṟ kācukku Uṟai
Oṉṟukku paṇam Oru māvum ceṅkaṇmāliccuram tirunāmattu
kāṇi nāṟpāṟ kellaiyum śarvamāṉṉiya Ūr Iṟaiyili
niṅkalāka Irācanārāyaṇaṉ cempurāyar tirumukappaṭi Uṭaiyā
r Aruḷic ceyalpaṭikku comaya taṇṇāyakkar paṭṭaiyappaṭi
pūrva matikkāri stāṉikar naṭattik koḷḷumpaṭi paḻaiya Oḻuki
ṉpaṭi taiyūr koṉpurattuc cerikālaipākkam kaṭalār
Ivvūrkaḷil Uṭaiyār ceṅkaṇ māliccuramuṭaiyaṉār tiruṉā
mattukkāṇiyum taiyyūr palataḷināyaṉmar tirunāmattu
kkāṇiyum pala nāyaṉmār tēvatāṉaṅkaḷum Āka paḻai
ya Oḻukiṉpaṭi nilam pattu veliyum Uḷḷūril nāyaṉmār tiru
maṭaviḷākaṅkaḷil Ēṟuṅkuṭiyil taṟikkaṭamai nūlāya
mum Iṉṉāyaṉārkku pūcai tiruppaṇikku sarvamāṉṉiya Iṟaiyili can
tirātittavarai Ippaṭi ceyvate Ittarmmattukku Akutañcoṉṉavaṉ kaṅkai karaiyil
koḷḷakaṭavaṉ Itu
śrī māy keśvarakṣai cittirameḻi ceṅkaṇmāliccura taiyyūr Ūravar rakṣai §
Iṉṉāyaṉṉār tirutaiyakart tirunāḷ taiyūril tiruulā ceytu tiruttukkuṭa kalayiṭattu
kāṇipaṭṭaṉ yāṉ ḷattil vaṭakku nāyiṉār koyil
tta prasāta Eḻuntaruḷa comateṇṇāyakkaṉ kaṭallāru tiruvi
Digital edition of SII 39.226 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
